# Formal AI agentic recipes (generated)

<!-- Generated by the Formal AI Agent CLI (`formal-ai agent`) from the planner's own
     recipe table (src/agentic_coding/diagram.rs). Do not hand-edit; regenerate. -->

A high-level, split-into-parts visual overview of how Formal AI drives its own agentic
CLI to complete a task. Part 1 shows how a request is routed to a recipe; each later part
details what happens for input handled by that recipe — the deterministic
`search -> fetch -> write -> verify -> final` state machine in `src/agentic_coding/`.

## Part 1 — Overview: how a task is routed

```mermaid
flowchart TD
    user["user task"] --> router{"plan_chat_step<br/>routes by keywords"}
    router -->|"formaliz / knowledge base / fisherman"| formalize["Formalize a text into a knowledge base (#468)"]
    router -->|"more detailed / grammatical number / a known concept"| meaning["Make a meaning more detailed (#538)"]
    router -->|"mermaid / diagram / visual overview"| diagram["Generate these diagrams (#538)"]
    router -->|"cst/ast / abstract-syntax / reason about itself"| self_ast["Store the CST/AST of the meta algorithm (#538)"]
    router -->|"otherwise"| solver["ordinary solver text"]
```

## Part 2 — Recipe: Formalize a text into a knowledge base (#468)

```mermaid
flowchart LR
    formalize_task["user task<br/>(formaliz / knowledge base / fisherman)"]
    formalize_task --> formalize_0["1. web_search<br/>find the source text"]
    formalize_0 --> formalize_1["2. web_fetch<br/>read it; a tool error falls back to the canonical synopsis"]
    formalize_1 --> formalize_2["3. write_file<br/>formalize prose into Links Notation"]
    formalize_2 --> formalize_3["4. run_command<br/>cat the file to verify the write landed"]
    formalize_3 --> formalize_final(["final answer<br/>the artifact inline"])
```

## Part 3 — Recipe: Make a meaning more detailed (#538)

```mermaid
flowchart LR
    meaning_task["user task<br/>(more detailed / grammatical number / a known concept)"]
    meaning_task --> meaning_0["1. web_search<br/>find the concept's Wikidata lexemes"]
    meaning_0 --> meaning_1["2. web_fetch<br/>read the forms; recover the missing plural"]
    meaning_1 --> meaning_2["3. write_file<br/>re-derive the grounded block, byte-for-byte the seed"]
    meaning_2 --> meaning_3["4. run_command<br/>cat the block to verify"]
    meaning_3 --> meaning_final(["final answer<br/>the artifact inline"])
```

## Part 4 — Recipe: Generate these diagrams (#538)

```mermaid
flowchart LR
    diagram_task["user task<br/>(mermaid / diagram / visual overview)"]
    diagram_task --> diagram_0["1. write_file<br/>render the mermaid parts from the recipe table"]
    diagram_0 --> diagram_1["2. run_command<br/>cat the document to verify"]
    diagram_1 --> diagram_final(["final answer<br/>the artifact inline"])
```

## Part 5 — Recipe: Store the CST/AST of the meta algorithm (#538)

```mermaid
flowchart LR
    self_ast_task["user task<br/>(cst/ast / abstract-syntax / reason about itself)"]
    self_ast_task --> self_ast_0["1. write_file<br/>parse the planner via meta-language; write the AST node census"]
    self_ast_0 --> self_ast_1["2. run_command<br/>cat the census to verify"]
    self_ast_1 --> self_ast_final(["final answer<br/>the artifact inline"])
```
